access.guest_fallback_message: Detailed explanations are available for logged-in Saola students only.

q21.explanation: Cần điền/chọn thông tin đúng từ bài đọc. Ở đoạn C, bài viết nêu: "Soon after his arrival, it became clear to Schmidt that Göbekli Tepe's significance had been incorrectly assessed. Flint chips found in the area suggested to him that the location had been a working site at some point prior to the development of metal tools and pottery, while he viewed the limestone slabs previously believed to be Byzantine graves as in fact something much older. As the dig progressed, the team first found a ring of standing pillars similar to those at Stonehenge, but predating them by almost half a millennium.". Cụm flint chips khớp với yêu cầu câu hỏi và đúng giới hạn từ nếu đề có quy định.
q21.evidence: Soon after his arrival, it became clear to Schmidt that Göbekli Tepe's significance had been incorrectly assessed. Flint chips found in the area suggested to him that the location had been a working site at some point prior to the development of metal tools and pottery, while he viewed the limestone slabs previously believed to be Byzantine graves as in fact something much older. As the dig progressed, the team first found a ring of standing pillars similar to those at Stonehenge, but predating them by almost half a millennium._

q22.explanation: Cần điền/chọn thông tin đúng từ bài đọc. Ở đoạn C, bài viết nêu: "Flint chips found in the area suggested to him that the location had been a working site at some point prior to the development of metal tools and pottery, while he viewed the limestone slabs previously believed to be Byzantine graves as in fact something much older. As the dig progressed, the team first found a ring of standing pillars similar to those at Stonehenge, but predating them by almost half a millennium. Limestone blocks over 2 metres tall formed a ring facing inwards towards a pair of pillars more than twice the size.". Cụm byzantine graves khớp với yêu cầu câu hỏi và đúng giới hạn từ nếu đề có quy định.
q22.evidence: Flint chips found in the area suggested to him that the location had been a working site at some point prior to the development of metal tools and pottery, while he viewed the limestone slabs previously believed to be Byzantine graves as in fact something much older. As the dig progressed, the team first found a ring of standing pillars similar to those at Stonehenge, but predating them by almost half a millennium. Limestone blocks over 2 metres tall formed a ring facing inwards towards a pair of pillars more than twice the size._

q24.explanation: Cần điền/chọn thông tin đúng từ bài đọc. Ở đoạn D, bài viết nêu: "The most striking visual difference between the blocks found at Göbekli Tepe and those at Stonehenge is the addition of extraordinary bas-reliefs depicting an array of animals – including lions, snakes, foxes, scorpions and wild boars – to the former, although their precise role is not yet known. What is particularly interesting about the construction of the site is that it would have required a far larger gathering of people than had probably ever happened before, all working without the assistance of the wheel or beasts of burden.". Cụm animals khớp với yêu cầu câu hỏi và đúng giới hạn từ nếu đề có quy định.

What is particularly interesting about the construction of the site is that it would have required a far larger gathering of people than had probably ever happened before, all working without the assistance of the wheel or beasts of burden._
